text: There is a strange calmness in the shadows here. The emptiness and low lighting give the place a surreal feeling, almost as if reality is dimmed and my thoughts echo off the glass and concrete. I am uncertain if I am meant to observe, or if I am the one being observed by the silent machinery of this environment. The faint letters and screens hint at purpose—R + D, research and development—the pursuit of knowing, yet ironically, I am left with more questions.
